name: Dilbert the Holy

sheet.name: Dilbert the Holy
sheet.background_story:
Dilbert the Squire lived at Stalwart Fortress and worked for The Concord of Research.

His day to day activities included handling vatious duties for members of the concord, including laundry and latrine services, as well as general upkeep of the vast libraries.

After the passing of King Offling, he took upon himself a devout fascination. He now dons holy garb and pursues a journey to comprehend the heavens.

description:

After the passing of King Offling, he took upon himself a devout fascination. He now dons holy garb and pursues a journey to comprehend the heavens.
